summary: Updated AGENTS.md with Clean Architecture key decision, Repository/UseCase/DTO naming conventions, and 5 new forbidden patterns (domain purity, no direct repo calls, DTOs for serialization, renamed services, no emoji on domain enums). Updated 3-3-client-layers.mmd to add UseCaseLayer and DomainLayer, rename ServiceLayer to DataLayer. Updated 3-4-provider-graph.mmd to rename authServiceProvider/itemServiceProvider to authRepositoryProvider/itemRepositoryProvider and add use case provider nodes. flutter analyze → 0 issues.
